description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front features a spacious balcony with glass railings, a ground-level patio, and a small swimming pool set in a grassy yard. A covered carport with a slanted roof is attached to one side, sheltering a classic car. The rear of the house has an exterior staircase leading to the upper floor, and the windows are large and rectangular, providing ample natural light. The exterior is finished in white and gray tones, with some green accents from potted plants and the lawn. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and functional, minimalist architecture.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, glass balcony, carport, and a pool set in a grassy yard. The design features clean lines, large windows, and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony with glass railings, ground-level patio, pool, and a tire swing on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the covered carport with a classic car underneath and potted plants near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows and the solid, minimalistic back facade with no visible entry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the exterior staircase leading to the upper floor and the balcony above the pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rectangular windows on multiple sides
